specific_question: What percentage of the 2024 improvements in customer service quality was attributed to a series of training documentation refinements initiated by Sophie Tran?
answer: According to the February 2025 internal Process & Operations analysis report, at least 25% of the customer service quality improvements recorded in the previous year were directly tied to Sophie Tran's refinements of the training documentation.
